query:
-- 查看ABC Furniture的ID
SELECT id, companyName FROM companies WHERE companyName = 'ABC Furniture';

-- 查看当前所有与ABC Furniture关联的批次
SELECT vcl.*, pv.variantCode 
FROM variant_customer_links vcl
JOIN product_variants pv ON vcl.variantId = pv.id
WHERE vcl.customerId = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE companyName = 'ABC Furniture' LIMIT 1);

-- 删除DC-001-B001/B002/B003/B004与ABC Furniture的关联
DELETE FROM variant_customer_links 
WHERE customerId = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE companyName = 'ABC Furniture' LIMIT 1)
AND variantId IN (
  SELECT id FROM product_variants 
  WHERE variantCode IN ('DC-001-B001', 'DC-001-B002', 'DC-001-B003', 'DC-001-B004')
);

-- 验证删除后的结果
SELECT vcl.*, pv.variantCode 
FROM variant_customer_links vcl
JOIN product_variants pv ON vcl.variantId = pv.id
WHERE vcl.customerId = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE companyName = 'ABC Furniture' LIMIT 1);
